entries.description: Frame validation returned `needs_decomposition` on mechanism-plausibility grounds.
entries.refutable_with: A case in which the bundle conflates mechanism-distinct techniques and procedure Step 1 returns `valid`.

entries.description: Refuse-bundle-while-constraining-disaggregated-components engaged for the third time (after cases 02, 03).
entries.refutable_with: A case in which the bundle is genuinely non-decomposable and the procedure still produces this Step 9 shape.

entries.description: Mechanism-plausibility-as-decomposition-axis emerges as a framework candidate specific to scientific-evidential-ambiguity cases.
entries.refutable_with: A scientific-evidential-ambiguity case in which mechanism plausibility is NOT load-bearing.
